channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AP: FBI Fires Agents in Trump Classified Docs Case
item.description: The FBI has fired additional agents who worked on an investigation into President Donald Trump, this time terminating employees who participated in th...

item.title: Trump envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner in Geneva for closely watched Iran negotiations
item.description: Oman’s Foreign Minister Sayyid Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi meets Trump envoy Steve Witkoff in Geneva as U.S. and Iran exchange proposals on Tehran’s nuc...

item.title: US, Iran to Hold a Third Round of Nuclear Talks
item.description: Iran and the United States prepared to meet Thursday in Geneva for nuclear negotiations, talks viewed as a last chance for diplomacy as America has ga...

item.title: Furious Ilhan Omar Demands Probe After Her Radical SOTU Guest Is Arrested—She Might Look Familiar to You
Hillary Clinton to Testify in Congressional Epstein Probe
item.description: Former U.S. Secretary of State Hillary Clinton is due to testify behind closed doors on Thursday to a congressional committee investigating the late s...

item.title: 'Squad' member claims State of the Union guest was arrested
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar's says her guest to President Donald Trump's State of the Union address was arrested by Capitol Police.

item.title: Off-Duty ICE Agents Save a Boy's Life; So Much for the Terrorized Citizens and ICE Gestapo Narrative
Fetterman hailed Trump's SOTU speech as 'powerful' for honoring veterans as other Dems were more critical
item.description: Trump delivered the longest State of the Union in U.S. history at 1 hour 48 minutes, drawing praise from Sen. Fetterman, D-Pa., for honoring veterans ...

item.title: Reuters/Ipsos Poll: Most Americans Back Trump's Deportation Goals but Not His Tactics
item.description: Most Americans share President Donald Trump's view that immigrants living illegally in the U.S. should be deported, but generally disapprove of his ha...

item.title: Former U.S. Air Force Major Arrested for Training Chinese Military Pilots
Blue State Justice: 'Monster' CA Child Predator to Be Released Because He's Not a Threat at Age 64
Clintons Face GOP Deposition in Epstein Probe
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton will give closed-door depositions to the GOP-led House Oversight Committee...

item.title: Judge orders Ilhan Omar attack suspect to remain in custody pending trial
item.description: A man accused of assaulting Rep. Ilhan Omar with apple cider vinegar at a Minneapolis town hall was ordered to remain in custody until trial.

item.title: FBI Raid of LAUSD Superintendent Reportedly Part of Securities Fraud Prosecution of AI Startup CEO
Supreme Court litigator convicted of tax evasion
item.description: A Supreme Court litigator was found guilty this week of tax evasion and related charges stemming from his lifestyle as an ultra-high-stakes poker play...
